title: Trump and Rubio Insist Iran War Is Over, Even as Missiles Fly During Cease-Fire
summary_full: The White House is turning to rhetorical leaps as President Trump tries to put the biggest political crisis of his presidency behind him.
summary_public: The White House is turning to rhetorical leaps as President Trump tries to put the biggest political crisis of his presidency behind him.
